use_cases: Display freelancer earnings with change indicators and time periods
Show professional ranking with category and place information
Present availability status using animated progress bars
Summarize key metrics with sub-statistics for quick insights
Create dashboard widgets for freelancer performance tracking
ai_summary: A composite card component designed to display freelancer statistics including earnings with percentage changes, sub-statistics with labels, ranking information with icons, and animated availability bars. Built with Framer Motion for staggered entrance animations and shadcn/ui styling conventions. Ideal for freelancer dashboards, SaaS platforms, and creator tools that need to present professional performance metrics in a clean, minimal interface.
